<start_of_turn>model
{"story_text": "Vihas sat at the table, his eyes wide with curiosity. He had just discovered a magical portal hidden beneath the table.", "question": "What do you think is on the other side of the portal?", "is_ending": false}<end_of_turn>

<bos><start_of_turn>user

{"story_text": "Vihas was amazed by the hall. He could see different eras of time, from ancient Egypt to the future.", "question": "Which time period would you like to visit?", "is_ending": false}<end_of_turn>
